title: Section 11
content: (1) Except as otherwise provided in this Act, specific performance of a 1[contract shall], be enforced when the act agreed to be done is in the performance wholly or partly of a trust. (2) A contract made by a trustee in excess of his powers or in breach of trust cannot be specifically enforced.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 2018, s. 4, for contract may, in the discretion of the court (w.e.f. 1-10-2018).
